title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past
main_description: Luffy collapses under Ace’s death while the story turns back to his childhood with Ace and Sabo. The chapter mainly follows Sabo, Dadan, Franky, Luffy, keeping the focus on the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline.
